chapter_title: Transfer of Title or Interest in Undocumented Vessel
text: The method provided in this chapter for perfecting a security interest in a vessel numbered under this code is exclusive.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3.5. REGISTRATION AND TRANSFER OF VESSELS [9840 - 9928]
### Chapter 3. Transfer of Title or Interest in Undocumented Vessel [9900 - 9928]
##### § 9922

The method provided in this chapter for perfecting a security interest in a vessel numbered under this code is exclusive.

*(Added by Stats. 1970, Ch. 1428.)*

subsections.text: The method provided in this chapter for perfecting a security interest in a vessel numbered under this code is exclusive.
